content: {"decision":"PASS","risk":"low","findings":["Read-only promotion_readiness preserves no autonomous promotion: allows_autonomous_promotion=false and requires_human_ack=true in all paths.","READY_FOR_HUMAN_REVIEW is gated on surface PASS, score>=90, graph PASS, promotion_guard_allowed=true, no small_bottlenecks, and no pending human ack.","promotion_guard_allowed=false forces HUMAN_ACK_REQUIRED and human_ack_pending=true.","Blocked graph and safety-missing cases remain promotion blockers even when status surface can otherwise PASS.","Quality gate WATCH/ERROR/UNKNOWN becomes a bounded bottleneck and prevents READY_FOR_HUMAN_REVIEW; malformed or explicit empty quality gate input blocks via schema failure.","No AGI completion claim introduced; quality_gate is included in the no_agi_completion_claims aggregate check.","No shell/model/git side effects apparent in shown code; added call is read-only status construction.","Tests reported passing: 58/58."]}
